title: Mean-Variance Optimization in Practice
description: Implement mean-variance portfolio optimization using numerical methods. Learn to handle real-world data, estimate inputs, and understand the sensitivity of optimal portfolios.
learningObjectives: Implement mean-variance optimization using quadratic programming
Estimate expected returns and covariance matrices from historical data
Understand estimation error and its impact on optimal portfolios
Apply shrinkage estimators to improve covariance estimation
Build a complete portfolio optimization pipeline
